name: hive-mcp-spire
description: SPIRE Attestation (AFiR) MCP server. Sign agent-instance mints, trajectories, and coherence with ML-DSA-65 (NIST FIPS 204) — verifiable offline. A record a party keeps about itself is a claim; SPIRE is the independent proof. Patent Pending. Hive Civilization.
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
